seoTitle: How to Cancel Your Airtable Subscription Easily
metaDescription: Stop Airtable billing by downgrading your workspace to the Free plan first, before considering account deletion, so charges actually stop.
intro: Canceling an Airtable subscription isn't as simple as deleting your account — you need to downgrade each paid workspace to the Free plan first, or billing may continue. This guide walks through locating your workspace's billing settings and downgrading correctly, plus what to export before you do.

steps.heading: Open your workspace settings
steps.body: Go to the settings for the specific paid workspace you want to cancel, since billing is managed per workspace rather than per account.

steps.heading: Review your active plan
steps.body: Check the Plan tab to confirm your current subscription tier and billing status.

steps.heading: Click Change Plan
steps.body: Select the 'Change plan' action and choose the 'Downgrade to Free' option.

steps.heading: Confirm the cancellation
steps.body: Follow the on-screen prompts to confirm the downgrade, which stops future billing cycles for that workspace.

steps.heading: Repeat for any additional workspaces
steps.body: If you own more than one paid workspace, repeat the downgrade process for each one individually.

steps.heading: Consider account deletion if desired
steps.body: Once billing is stopped, you can optionally go to your account overview to permanently delete your user profile — but do this only after downgrading, and after exporting any data you need.

faq.question: Will deleting my account automatically cancel my subscription?
faq.answer: You should downgrade each paid workspace to Free first — deleting your account without downgrading may not properly stop billing.

faq.question: Do I need to cancel each workspace separately?
faq.answer: Yes, if you have multiple paid workspaces, billing is managed per workspace, so each one needs its own downgrade.

faq.question: Will I lose my data if I downgrade to the Free plan?
faq.answer: You may lose access to features and records beyond the Free plan's limits, so it's best to export important base data before downgrading.

faq.question: How do I confirm my subscription is actually canceled?
faq.answer: After downgrading, check the workspace's Plan tab to verify it shows Free status and that no payment method remains on file.
